nasb.text: Abraham breathed his last and died in a ripe old age, an old man and satisfied with life; and he was gathered to his people.

esv.text: Abraham breathed his last and died in a good old age, an old man and full of years, and was gathered to his people.

cnv.text: 亞伯拉罕壽高年老，享盡天年，氣絕而死，歸到他的先人那裡去了。

ccb.text: 享尽天年，寿终正寝，归到他祖先那里。

csbs.text: 亚伯拉罕年迈高龄，尽享天年，气绝而死，归到他的先人那里。
